prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins with a very dark, low-visibility shot. A pale object or appliance-like form is faintly visible in the center, but the scene is too underexposed to identify clearly.

It then cuts to a close-up of a white kitchen appliance bearing the label “PRESTO SaladShooter” and the words “SLICER-SHREDDER.” The product is shown at an angle, with the brand name in orange and the product name in large black lettering. The shot emphasizes the product’s exterior label and branding.

Next, the appliance is shown on a kitchen counter. A hand holds or steadies it, and the cylindrical outlet or chute is visible at the front. The image appears partly superimposed with other kitchen elements, suggesting a dissolve or layered transition. In the background, there are containers and countertop items, but they are soft and partially obscured.

The sequence continues with another dissolve: the appliance remains semi-visible while a large bowl or platter of salad appears in the foreground. The bowl contains assorted vegetables or salad ingredients, with green leafy pieces and other colorful items visible. The product and prepared food overlap visually, linking the appliance to salad preparation.

A further montage-like shot shows food on a countertop. There are small piles of shredded or chopped ingredients, and a hand or utensil-like motion appears blurred over the surface. Other food items, including round items that may be vegetables or baked goods, are visible around the work area, though the overlapping imagery makes details unclear.

The appliance is then shown being used over a yellow bowl filled with lettuce or salad greens. A hand holds the white device, and the front chute points downward toward the bowl. A product card or label reading “SaladShooter” is visible inside or beside the bowl. The image suggests the appliance is dispensing sliced or shredded ingredients onto the salad, though the exact food pieces are hard to distinguish because of motion blur and double exposure.

The final shots return to extreme close-ups of the appliance label. The camera frames the word “SaladShooter” diagonally across the screen, with the line “ELECTRIC • SLICER • SHREDDER” visible beneath it. The last frame remains a tight, angled branding shot, emphasizing the product name and function text.
